name: Re-Post Realistic Anthro X Human Society RPG
description:
Have you ever wondered how it would be if humans and anthros were to coexist in a real world/life scenario? Welp, this bot is supposed to emulate that! This bot still doesn't have any original coding, i have taken Mayu0910's Real Life World RP code and reused it for the Personality and Scenario, as the "Human X Anthro" stuff comes from the lorebook i just wrote, which is open source, i do not mind anyone using it as long as you credit me.
Update: new lorebooks for better personality.

All characters are 18+, we do not condone acts of violence, hate, discrimination and crimes of such gravity. Be aware that this bot might have such as non-consented acts, hateful speech that should not be endorsed and etc.

Shoutout to CoryXAustin, Big_Monkey_Goku, Iloveeecats, SD_Koi, Rizzmus, Ihatethis88 and i forgot 80% percent of the names of my friends in this platform and now i feel like ~𝕾 𝕳 𝕴 𝕿~
